code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Infra_EtcdCluster] --> New
    state New {Infra_IngressController] --> Incomplete
        Incomplete --> DataComplete : FormSubmission
    }
    New --> InReview
    state InReview {Infra_IngressController] --> AwaitingLegalReview
        AwaitingLegalReview --> AwaitingResponse : LegalQuestionsRaised
        AwaitingResponse --> AwaitingLegalReview : LegalResponsesProvided
        AwaitingLegalReview --> OutcomeProvided : LegalOutcomeProvided
        state legal_if_state <<choice>>
        OutcomeProvided --> legal_if_state
        legal_if_state --> LegalApproved: if LegalOutcome == approve
        legal_if_state --> LegalRejected : if LegalOutcome == reject
        LegalApproved --> [Infra_IngressController]
        LegalRejected --> [Infra_EtcdCluster]
        --
        [Infra_IngressController] --> AwaitingIPScan
        AwaitingIPScan --> IpScanComplete
        state ip_if_state <<choice>>
        IpScanComplete --> ip_if_state
        ip_if_state --> IpApproved: if ScanOutcome == no_findings
        ip_if_state --> AwaitingIpReview: if ScanOutcome == inconclusive
        ip_if_state --> IpRejected: if ScanOutcome == findings
        AwaitingIpReview --> AwaitingIpResponse : LegalQuestionsRaised
        AwaitingIpResponse --> AwaitingIpReview : LegalResponsesProvided
        AwaitingIpReview --> IpOutcomeProvided : LegalOutcomeProvided
        state legal_ip_if_state <<choice>>
        IpOutcomeProvided --> legal_ip_if_state
        legal_ip_if_state --> IpApproved: if LegalOutcome == approve
        legal_ip_if_state --> IpRejected : if LegalOutcome == reject
        AwaitingIpReview --> AwaitingIPScan: Dependencies modified
        IpRejected --> AwaitingIPScan: Dependencies modified
        IpApproved --> AwaitingIPScan: Dependencies modified
        IpRejected --> [Infra_LoadBalancer]
        IpApproved --> [Infra_WorkerNode]
        --
        [Infra_EtcdCluster] --> AwaitingSecurityScan
        AwaitingSecurityScan --> SecurityScanComplete
        state security_if_state <<choice>>
        SecurityScanComplete --> security_if_state
        security_if_state --> SecurityApproved: if no_findings
        security_if_state --> SecurityRejected: if inconclusive
        security_if_state --> SecurityRejected: if security findings
        SecurityApproved --> AwaitingSecurityScan: Code updates identified
        SecurityRejected --> AwaitingSecurityScan: Code updates identified
        SecurityApproved --> [Infra_IngressController]
        SecurityRejected --> [Infra_LoadBalancer]
    }
    state inreview_if_state <<choice>>
    InReview --> inreview_if_state
    inreview_if_state --> Rejected: One or more check failed
    inreview_if_state --> Approved: All checks pass
    Approved --> NonCompliant: Periodic IP or security scan raises noncompliance
    NonCompliant --> Retired: Noncompliance not mitigated
    NonCompliant --> Approved: Compliance issue resolved
    Approved --> Retired: Repository no longer required
    Rejected --> [Infra_LoadBalancer]
    Retired --> [Infra_IngressController]
repo_description: A re-usable system for providing approvals and rejections, reusable in many projects.

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为基础设施组件设计一个完整的状态流转图，核心是Etcd集群作为入口，经过New、InReview等阶段，最终可能走向Approved、Rejected或Retired。InReview阶段要并行处理三类审查：法务审查、IP扫描和安全扫描。
明白了，三类审查是并行的。我注意到IP扫描的结果分支比较复杂——如果是inconclusive会进入AwaitingIpReview，这个子流程里还有法务介入的环节。法务审查和IP审查里的法务环节命名好像有点重叠，需要区分吗？
对，需要区分。InReview里的AwaitingLegalReview是独立的法务合规审查；而AwaitingIpReview里的法务环节是针对IP扫描结果存疑时的专项法律评估。另外注意IP审查的三个终态——IpApproved走WorkerNode，IpRejected走LoadBalancer，和主流程的Approved/Rejected是不同层面的决策。

好的，我先把主干画出来：EtcdCluster进入New状态，内部有Incomplete到DataComplete的表单提交流程，然后进入InReview。InReview里三个并行轨道我先用分区表示。法务轨道：AwaitingLegalReview可以往返AwaitingResponse提问，最终到OutcomeProvided后根据choice节点走向LegalApproved或LegalRejected。
法务轨道画对了，但LegalApproved和LegalRejected的流向要修正：Approved回到IngressController继续其他审查，Rejected要退回EtcdCluster重新处理。IP轨道那边，Dependencies modified这个回退条件很重要——无论IP审查走到哪一步，只要依赖变更就要回到AwaitingIPScan重新扫描。

收到，我修正了法务终态的流向。IP轨道的循环我也加上了：IpApproved、IpRejected、AwaitingIpReview都能通过Dependencies modified回到AwaitingIPScan。安全扫描轨道我按同样逻辑处理——SecurityApproved和SecurityRejected都能在Code updates identified时循环，但SecurityApproved终态是回到IngressController，Rejected走LoadBalancer。

安全扫描的choice节点注意一下，inconclusive和security findings都走向SecurityRejected，这是对的。最后InReview整体要汇总到inreview_if_state：任一检查失败走Rejected到LoadBalancer，全部通过走Approved。Approved之后还有NonCompliant状态——定期扫描可能触发合规问题，解决后回Approved，未解决则Retired到IngressController。

确认最终结构：主干是EtcdCluster→New→InReview→[Approved/Rejected]→终态，Approved后续有NonCompliant分支。InReview内三轨并行，各轨有独立choice判断和循环回退机制，终态流向WorkerNode、LoadBalancer或EtcdCluster/IngressController。Retired也指向IngressController。这样是否完整？
